name: ankit-portfolio
description: React portfolio restored from the deployed build source maps.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('vercel.json','utf8')); for (const file of ['src/App.jsx','src/components/About/About.jsx','src/components/About/AboutCard.jsx','src/Assets/about.png']) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error('Missing source file: ' + file); } console.log('Source project checks passed.');"
scripts.deploy:check: npm run build && npm test && npm run smoke
